$$ \frac{\partial P}{\partial x} = \frac{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2} - \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}}{x^2 + y^2} $$
To simplify the numerator, find a common denominator:
$$ \frac{\partial P}{\partial x} = \frac{\frac{(\sqrt{x^2 + y^2})^2}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}} - \frac{x^2}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}}{x^2 + y^2} = \frac{\frac{x^2 + y^2 - x^2}{\sqrt{x^2 + y^2}}}{x^2 + y^2} $$
